programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Generali Open 2026
programme.desc: The Generali Open 2026 is an ATP 250 clay-court event held in Kitzbühel, Austria, from 20 to 25 July. Staged at the Kitzbühel Tennis Stadium and offering €612,620 in prize money, the tournament is one of the ATP Tour’s traditional Alpine stops, with players competing for the title on outdoor clay.

programme.title: Club Brugge vs Atlético De Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Play-Offs -1st leg
programme.desc: Club Brugge and Atlético Madrid have faced on eight previous occasions in Europe, with both sides picking up three victories apiece. They also have the same number of wins in games in the European Cup/UEFA Champions League specifically. Atlético Madrid have failed to score in each of their last three games against Club Brugge in the UEFA Champions

programme.title: Club’s History : AJ Auxerre
programme.desc: The exclusive documentary on the wild history of AJ Auxerre. How did this small village come to dominate French soccer and become iconic?

programme.title: Bodø/Glimt vs Inter - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Play-Offs -1st leg
programme.desc: The only previous meetings Bodø/Glimt and Internazionale came in the 1978-79 Cup Winners’ Cup, with the Italian side winning both legs for a 7-1 aggregate victory. This will be just the second UEFA Champions League knockout stage tie played between sides from Norway and Italy, after Juventus’ elimination of Rosenborg in the quarter-finals of the 1

programme.title: Olympiacos vs Bayer 04 Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Play-Offs -1st leg
programme.desc: Olympiakos and Bayer Leverkusen have faced on three previous occasions in the UEFA Champions League – the Greek side have won two of those, with the most recent coming last month: a 2-0 home win on MD7 of the league phase. Bayer Leverkusen have only won one of their five away games against Greek sides in Europe, failing to win on each their four tr

programme.title: Ligue 1 - Film of the Season : Destiny
programme.desc: Destiny tells the story of a historic and completely crazy 2025/26 season through the voices of those who lived it.

programme.title: EPL Stories 2026/2027 EP.1 Lee Bowyer
programme.desc: We sit down with Lee Bowyer to look back on the career of one of the Premier League’s fiercest and most competitive midfielders. From his rise at Charlton to becoming a key figure in the brilliant Leeds United side that challenged Europe’s elite and reached the Champions League semi-finals, Bowyer reflects on the highs, controversies and defining m

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Atlético de Madrid vs Club Brugge - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Play-Offs -2nd leg

programme.title: Arsenal vs Everton - English Premier League
programme.desc: Arsenal are unbeaten in their last six Premier League games against Everton, having lost four of their previous five against them. Everton have won just one of their last 29 away league games against Arsenal, picking up a 1-0 win in April 2021.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Aston Villa - English Premier League
programme.desc: Manchester United have lost just two of their last 37 home league games against Aston Villa, going down 1-0 both times in December 2009 and September 2021. Following their 2-1 win in December, Aston Villa are looking to complete the league double over Manchester United for the first time since 1954-55.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 250 Millennium Estoril Open 2026
programme.desc: The Millennium Estoril Open 2026 marks the tournament’s return to ATP 250 status in Portugal, running from 20 to 26 July in Estoril. Played on clay, it stands as the country’s only ATP Tour event, bringing international players to one of Portugal’s leading tennis stages.

programme.title: France vs Spain - FIFA World Cup 2026 - Semi-Finals
programme.desc: This will be just the second ever FIFA World Cup meeting between France and Spain, following their last 16 meeting back in 2006, with Les Bleus progressing having come from behind to win 3-1. Spain have lost just two of their last 10 meetings with France in all competitions, winning each of the last two.
